targets.queryText: SELECT 'Applied' AS stage, COUNT(DISTINCT application_id) AS value FROM status_events WHERE status='applied' UNION ALL SELECT 'Next Step', COUNT(DISTINCT application_id) FROM status_events WHERE status='next_step' UNION ALL SELECT 'Offer', COUNT(DISTINCT application_id) FROM status_events WHERE status='offer'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM applications WHERE current_status='rejected'

SELECT 100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT application_id) FROM status_events WHERE status='next_step') / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT application_id) FROM status_events WHERE status='applied'), 0) AS value
